requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — COGUANOR Conformity and Project Procurement Context
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——COGUANOR合格评定及项目采购背景
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——COGUANOR合格評定及項目採購背景

summary.en: For Guatemala market entry and grid-tied PV projects, inverter safety evidence should be checked against COGUANOR-adopted standards, importer conformity obligations, and project specifications. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the international safety standards normally requested for PV power converters and inverters. COGUANOR is Guatemala's national standards body and may adopt or reference IEC-based standards, while CNEE, distributors, or project owners may require IEC 62109 reports as part of the equipment technical file. Evidence should cover the specific model or model family, firmware-relevant safety functions, nameplate ratings, environmental ratings, and installation manual.
summary.zh: 危地马拉市场准入和并网光伏项目中，逆变器安全证据应结合COGUANOR采纳标准、进口商合格评定义务和项目规格核验。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率变换器及逆变器通常要求的国际安全标准。COGUANOR是危地马拉国家标准机构，可能采纳或引用IEC体系标准；CNEE、配电商或项目业主也可能要求IEC 62109报告作为设备技术文件的一部分。证据应覆盖特定型号或型号系列、与固件相关的安全功能、铭牌额定值、环境额定值和安装手册。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉市場准入和併網光伏項目中，逆變器安全證據應結合COGUANOR採納標準、進口商合格評定義務和項目規格核驗。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率轉換器及逆變器通常要求的國際安全標準。COGUANOR是瓜地馬拉國家標準機構，可能採納或引用IEC體系標準；CNEE、配電商或項目業主也可能要求IEC 62109報告作為設備技術文件的一部分。證據應覆蓋特定型號或型號系列、與韌體相關的安全功能、銘牌額定值、環境額定值和安裝手冊。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
COGUANOR — Guatemalan national standards adoption and conformity context

summary.en: China's common PV inverter safety evidence includes GB/T 37408-2019 and voluntary CQC or CGC certification using Chinese domestic standards and CNAS-accredited laboratories. Such evidence can be useful background, but it is not the same as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certification and is not an automatic Guatemala conformity or project acceptance decision. The Chinese file may also assume China nameplate conventions, grid voltage, 50 Hz operation, and Chinese-language installation documentation.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器安全证据包括GB/T 37408-2019及采用中国国内标准、由CNAS认可实验室支持的自愿性CQC或CGC认证。此类证据可作为背景材料，但不同于IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书，也不会自动构成危地马拉合格评定或项目接受结论。中国文件还可能假设中国铭牌惯例、电网电压、50 Hz运行和中文安装文件。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器安全證據包括GB/T 37408-2019及採用中國國內標準、由CNAS認可實驗室支持的自願性CQC或CGC認證。此類證據可作為背景材料，但不同於IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書，也不會自動構成瓜地馬拉合格評定或項目接受結論。中國文件還可能假設中國銘牌慣例、電網電壓、50 Hz運行和中文安裝文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A Chinese GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not replace IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Guatemala. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports or certificates for the supplied model or family, align labels and manuals with Spanish or bilingual project requirements, and verify whether COGUANOR conformity or the project owner requires a locally recognised certificate, accredited-lab report, or additional importer declaration.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能替代危地马拉所需的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。出口商应取得所供型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告或证书，使标签和手册符合西班牙语或双语项目要求，并核实COGUANOR合格评定或项目业主是否要求当地认可证书、认可实验室报告或额外进口商声明。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能替代瓜地馬拉所需的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。出口商應取得所供型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告或證書，使標籤和手冊符合西班牙語或雙語項目要求，並核實COGUANOR合格評定或項目業主是否要求當地認可證書、認可實驗室報告或額外進口商聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent and often mandatory through COGUANOR conformity expectations, CNEE/distributor technical files, importer obligations, or procurement specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 and many CQC/CGC PV inverter certifications are China domestic or scheme-specific evidence, not Guatemala acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-only GB/T safety certificate is not enough to assume Guatemala acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for the actual inverter model, confirm COGUANOR conformity expectations and project-owner requirements, and make sure labels and manuals support Guatemala installation and inspection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅有中国GB/T安全证书不足以推定危地马拉接受。应为实际逆变器型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2证据，确认COGUANOR合格评定预期和项目业主要求，并确保标签和手册支持危地马拉安装和检查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅有中國GB/T安全證書不足以推定瓜地馬拉接受。應為實際逆變器型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2證據，確認COGUANOR合格評定預期和項目業主要求，並確保標籤和手冊支持瓜地馬拉安裝和檢查。
